mnemonics.title: Tool Purpose Mnemonic: P.A.W.R.
mnemonics.content: ProcMon for Activity (broad system), API Monitor for Windows APIs (deep), Wireshark for Web (network), Regshot for Registry (snapshot).

mnemonics.title: Persistence Locations
mnemonics.content: Remember common Auto-start locations: 'HKCU\Run...' and 'HKLM\Run...' for User and Machine persistence.
